new_classes.label_en: Waters incl. mineral waters and aerated waters, containing added sugar or other sweetening matter or flavoured (CN 2202 10 00)
new_classes.label_de: Wasser, einschl. Mineralwasser und kohlensäurehaltiges Wasser, mit Zusatz von Zucker, anderen Süßmitteln oder Aromastoffen (KN 2202 10 00)
new_classes.definition_en: Waters, including mineral waters and aerated waters, containing added sugar or other sweetening matter or flavoured, classified under CN subheading 2202 10 00. Includes soft drinks as described in the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2202, paragraph (A). The presence of anti-oxidants, vitamins, stabilisers or quinine does not affect classification.

coverage_explanation: The three restrictions capture the three key discriminating criteria from the legal text: (1) the product is water (mineral or aerated water quality), (2) it contains added sugar, sweetening matter, or flavouring (FlavoredOrSweetenedWaterQuality), and (3) it is non-alcoholic (NonAlcoholicBeverageQuality). These together distinguish 2202 10 00 from sibling CN 2202 90 (other non-alcoholic beverages, which are not water-based) and from CN 2201 (unflavoured/unsweetened waters). The coverage is not 1.0 because the HS Explanatory Note reference to paragraph (A) soft drinks and the explicit 'does not affect classification' note for anti-oxidants, vitamins, stabilisers, and quinine are interpretive/administrative annotations that cannot be straightforwardly encoded as OWL class axioms without introducing additional quality classes not yet in the TBox. The exclusion of fruit/vegetable juices of heading 2009 is inherited from the parent class SugaredFlavoredWaterNonAlcoholicBeverage2202 and therefore covered implicitly.
